news.title: Neuromorphic computers can now solve complex physics simulations
news.snippet: Neuromorphic computers modeled after the human brain can now solve the complex equations behind physics simulations — something once thought possible only with energy-hungry supercomputers.

tech.title: The Best AI Tools for 2026
